verdicts.claim: North Toronto Basketball Association (NTBA): principal=Chris Easton, President; phone=416-481-1555; email=ntbaregistrar@bell.net
verdicts.evidence: NTBA board page (ntbasketball.com/about/the-board/) lists Chris Easton as 'President / Treasurer / Girls House League'. Phone (416) 481-1555 independently confirmed via YellowPages and Yelp directory listings for North Toronto Basketball Assoc. Email ntbaregistrar@bell.net is the club's general/registrar contact (belongs to registrar Ron Campbell), also shown on the board page.
verdicts.correction: Nuance, not a refutation: ntbaregistrar@bell.net is the club's general registrar inbox, not Chris Easton's personal address; his listed personal email is ceaston@ca.ibm.com. As a valid club contact the field stands.

verdicts.claim: East York Basketball: principal=Gerald Rozario, President; phone=(none); email=info@eastyorkbasketball.com
verdicts.evidence: Ontario Basketball Association article (basketball.on.ca, 'East York Basketball Club named first Canada Basketball Verified club in Ontario') independently identifies Gerald Rozario as President of East York Basketball Club, describing him as a ~20-year coach. Email info@eastyorkbasketball.com confirmed on the club's own contact page ('For all Enquiries, please email us at info@eastyorkbasketball.com'). No phone published, consistent with the empty phone field.

verdicts.claim: Scarborough Basketball Association (SBA): principal=Sam Moncada, President; phone=416-551-7554; email=(none)
verdicts.evidence: Sam Moncada confirmed as founder/president of SBA via multiple independent sources (SBA Facebook page describing 'SBA's dedicated founder and president Sam Moncada', TCDSB Focus On Youth profile, ZoomInfo listing him as President at SBA Basketball). Phone 416-551-7554 confirmed as the SBA main line across independent directory listings (Firmania, Canpages) and the club's contact page.

verdicts.claim: Etobicoke Basketball Association: principal=Ray Chateau, President; phone=647-238-2690; email=(none)
verdicts.evidence: Etobicoke Basketball club history page (etobicokebasketball.com/about) confirms Ray Chateau as President (elected 2014). Phone (647) 238-2690 confirmed as the association's number across the club listing and directory results (ZoomInfo, YellowPages). No email published, consistent with the empty email field.

verdicts.claim: NET Basketball Academy (Toronto Nets): principal=Coach Daniel, Founder; phone=(none); email=(none)
verdicts.evidence: NET Basketball Academy 'About Us' (netba.ca) confirms Coach Daniel founded the not-for-profit NET Basketball Academy in 2015; NET operates the Toronto Nets program serving north-east Toronto. No phone or email surfaced publicly, consistent with the empty fields.
verdicts.correction: Only the first name 'Coach Daniel' is published; no public last name found.

verdicts.claim: North Region Basketball Association (NRBA): principal=Nick Biagini, Director; phone=647-519-3983; email=Nick.NRBA@gmail.com
verdicts.evidence: NRBA about page (tonrba.com/about/) lists Nick Biagini with the title 'League Director' (jointly with Joe Gagliardi). Contact page (tonrba.com/contact/) lists Nick Biagini with phone 647-519-3983 and email Nick.NRBA@gmail.com exactly. Instagram bio (@toronto.nrba) also credits 'Nick Biagini/Joe Gagliardi'.
verdicts.correction: Full title is 'League Director' (co-led with Joe Gagliardi); 'Director' is a correct shortening.

verdicts.claim: Toronto Triple Threat: principal=Norman Clarke, President; phone=(none); email=tttbasketballclub@gmail.com
verdicts.evidence: Toronto Triple Threat about-us page (torontotriplethreat.com/about-us/) lists Norman Clarke first in the Board of Directors with the title 'President' and repeats the contact email tttbasketballclub@gmail.com ('For all inquiries, please email tttbasketballclub@gmail.com'). Ontario Basketball Association and Basketball Canada articles independently describe Norman Clarke as founder/president of the club.

verdicts.claim: Toronto Lords Basketball (Toronto): principal="Bob Clarke" phone="(416) 598-4448" email=""
verdicts.evidence: Phone (416) 598-4448 appears on the club's own contact page and on the independent YellowPages.ca listing (address 4 Joseph Salsberg Lane, Toronto ON M6J 3W8). Bob Clarke is independently indexed as the current President of the Toronto Lords Basketball Association via LinkedIn/SportsEngine company listings; club formed 1995. No email was claimed, so no false statement (club's public general email is lordsbasketball@gmail.com if one is needed).
verdicts.correction: Claim omits Clarke's title, which is President. Optional public general email: lordsbasketball@gmail.com.

verdicts.claim: Basketball World Toronto (BWT) (Toronto): principal="Michael Reio, Founder & Executive Director" phone="(647) 444-4298" email="youth@bwt.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Michael Reio confirmed as Founder & Executive Director across independent sources (ZoomInfo, RocketReach, LinkedIn) and the org's own bwt.ca/about. Phone 647-444-4298 and youth@bwt.ca both listed on bwt.ca/contact-us and the youth-programs page (general inbox info@bwt.ca, adults@bwt.ca). Registered non-profit founded 2006; address 20a Duern St, Toronto ON M6N 4G7. Every field corroborated.

verdicts.claim: Canadian Basketball Academy (CBA) (Toronto): principal="Steven-Michael Ambrose, President" phone="(416) 993-9536" email="Admin@CanadaBasketball.com"
verdicts.evidence: Phone (416) 993-9536 and email Admin@CanadaBasketball.com are both displayed on the club's own website (canadianbballacademy.com); phone also corroborated by the independent Yelp listing (Toronto). Steven-Michael Ambrose is unambiguously tied to CBA as its head (LinkedIn 'Steven-Michael Ambrose - Canadian Basketball Academy', slug /in/stevencba; U of T Varsity Blues alum). Exact title 'President' was not verbatim-confirmed on an independent page (his LinkedIn would not load), but nothing contradicts it.
verdicts.correction: The email domain canadabasketball.com is the club's own vanity domain and is distinct from the NATIONAL governing body Canada Basketball (basketball.ca) — do not merge these two entities. Title 'President' is strongly supported but not independently verbatim-verified.

verdicts.claim: Canada Topflight Academy (CTA) (Ottawa): principal="Tony House, Founder & Head Coach" phone="613-797-2089" email=""
verdicts.evidence: Tony House confirmed as Founder & Head Coach across independent sources (BVM Sports feature, LinkedIn, OttawaSportsPages.ca, CBC News); founded CTA in 2016 in Ottawa. Phone (613) 797-2089 listed for CTA (710 Broadview Ave, Ottawa) via the GOALLINE-powered official site, FindGlocal, and ZoomInfo. No email claimed.

verdicts.claim: CIA Bounce / Nike EYBL (Toronto): principal="Tony McIntyre & Mike George, Co-founders" phone="" email="ciabounce@gmail.com"
verdicts.evidence: Tony McIntyre (founder of Bounce) and Mike George (founder of CIA) confirmed as the two co-founders who merged the programs into CIA Bounce, per Globe and Mail, Yahoo Sports and Bleacher Report. Email ciabounce@gmail.com independently confirmed as the CIA Bounce contact address (tied to Tony McIntyre) in a North Pole Hoops article. Only Canada-based team in Nike's EYBL. No phone claimed.
verdicts.correction: Mike George has since left CIA Bounce (departed to become an NBA agent for Anthony Bennett); Tony McIntyre is the remaining active principal. Program is based in the Brampton/Toronto area.

verdicts.claim: Grassroots Canada (Toronto): principal="Timeka Poyser" phone="(416) 272-0376" email="t_jpoyser@outlook.com"
verdicts.evidence: The contact bundle (Timeka Poyser / (416) 272-0376 / t_jpoyser@outlook.com) is real and attached to the 'Grassroots Elite Canada 2023' team listing on SportsEngine, based in Brampton ON. However, the documented founder/principal of Grassroots Canada is Ro Russell (grassrootscanada.org, LinkedIn 'Founder of AAU in Canada and of Grassroots', BasketballBuzz, FIBA). Poyser reads as a team-level administrative/parent contact (personal Outlook address), not the organization's principal.
verdicts.correction: Principal/founder of the organization is Ro Russell, not Timeka Poyser (Poyser is a team/administrative contact). The organization is based in Brampton, ON, not Toronto. t_jpoyser@outlook.com is a personal email — treat as PII.

verdicts.claim: LIFT AAU Basketball (Toronto): principal="Dustin Mactaggart, Founder & Owner" phone="(314) 409-1799" email="info@letitflybasketball.com"
verdicts.evidence: Owner Dustin Mactaggart is confirmed (letitflybasketball.com states it is 'owned and operated by Dustin Mactaggart'; LinkedIn 'High-Performance Basketball Coach'), and email info@letitflybasketball.com is confirmed on the club's own contact page. BUT the phone (314) 409-1799 does NOT appear on the Canadian club's contact page and is a St. Louis, MO (314) area code belonging to a DIFFERENT 'Let It Fly Basketball' entity (Cleveland OH; associated emails letitflyllc@gmail.com and benjamin.litteken@gmail.com; letitflybasketball.squarespace.com). The Canadian LIFT (Burlington ON) lists phone (905) 928-2174.
verdicts.correction: Replace phone (314) 409-1799 with (905) 928-2174 — the 314 number is a different US 'Let It Fly Basketball' organization, a conflation error. Owner (Dustin Mactaggart) and email (info@letitflybasketball.com) are correct. Club is based in Burlington, ON, not Toronto.
